name: Drift
category: Common / Starter Cards - Bright Red AE86
effect: +30 km/h to the corner speed limit calculation.

name: Accelerate
category: Common / Starter Cards - Bright Red AE86
effect: Speed +40 km/h.

name: Hard Brake
category: Common / Starter Cards - Bright Red AE86
effect: Speed -30 km/h.

name: Change Lane
category: Common / Starter Cards - Bright Red AE86
effect: Move to the other lane. You may discard 1 card from hand.

name: Early Brake Cornering
category: Common / Starter Cards - Bright Red AE86
effect: Speed -20 km/h. Move to the inner lane. You may discard 1 card from hand.

name: In-Out-In
category: Common / Starter Cards - Bright Red AE86
effect: During movement, move to the inner lane. At the end of movement, move to the outer lane. You may discard 1 card from hand.

name: Rocket Start
category: Common / Starter Cards - Bright Red AE86
effect: Speed +40 km/h. You may discard 1 card from hand.

name: Change Shift
category: Common / Starter Cards - Bright Red AE86
effect: Speed +10 km/h or -10 km/h. You may discard 1 card from hand. You may then play another card.

name: Clutch Kick
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: Speed +20 km/h. This turn, your first corner speed check gains +30 km/h.

name: Trail Braking
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: Before each corner speed check this turn, you may reduce Speed by 10 km/h.

name: Full Countersteer
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: If you would understeer this turn, you may cancel that understeer once.

name: Throttle Control
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: Once this turn, after moving into a corner speed check space, you may choose Speed +10 km/h or Speed -10 km/h.

name: Exit Drift
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: If you moved through at least 1 corner speed check space this turn, Speed +30 km/h.

name: Drift Extend
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: Your first corner speed bonus this turn also applies to the next corner speed check this turn.

name: Gutter Boost
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: If you ended movement in the inner lane of a corner, Speed +30 km/h.

name: Blind Attack
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: If you are the following car and in the same lane as the lead car, ignore blocking once this turn.

name: Jump Start Exit
category: Drift / Touge Technique Set - Bright Green Lamborghini Huracan
effect: If you moved from inner lane to outer lane this turn, Speed +40 km/h.

name: Grip Acceleration
category: AWD Grip Set - Yellow Porsche 911
effect: Speed +20 km/h. If you are not in a corner, you may discard 1 card from hand.

name: Early Power
category: AWD Grip Set - Yellow Porsche 911
effect: If you passed all corner speed checks this turn, Speed +30 km/h.

name: Traction Control
category: AWD Grip Set - Yellow Porsche 911
effect: If you would understeer this turn, reduce your speed by 10 km/h instead. Then cancel that understeer.

name: Grip Line
category: AWD Grip Set - Yellow Porsche 911
effect: +10 km/h to all corner speed limit calculations this turn. If you stay in the same lane during movement, you may discard 1 card from hand.

name: Balanced Chassis
category: AWD Grip Set - Yellow Porsche 911
effect: Once this turn, after a speed check, you may move sideways without spending movement.

name: Torque Split
category: AWD Grip Set - Yellow Porsche 911
effect: Choose one: Speed +20 km/h, or +30 km/h to your next corner speed check this turn.

name: Micro Correction
category: AWD Grip Set - Yellow Porsche 911
effect: During movement, move sideways. This does not cost movement if your speed is 80 km/h or lower.

name: Line Lock
category: AWD Grip Set - Yellow Porsche 911
effect: Choose your lane. While you remain in that lane this turn, all corner speed checks gain +30 km/h.

name: Raw Horsepower
category: Muscle Car Set - Blue Mustang GT500 with Black Stripes
effect: Speed +40 km/h. You may only move forward this turn. If you are on a straight, Speed +10 km/h again.

name: Straight-Line Monster
category: Muscle Car Set - Blue Mustang GT500 with Black Stripes
effect: If you are on a straight, Speed +50 km/h. Otherwise, Speed +20 km/h and your first corner speed check this turn gets -10 km/h.

name: Wide Open Throttle
category: Muscle Car Set - Blue Mustang GT500 with Black Stripes
effect: After each forward movement on a straight, Speed +10 km/h. This can trigger up to twice this turn.

name: Torque Monster
category: Muscle Car Set - Blue Mustang GT500 with Black Stripes
effect: Speed +30 km/h. This turn, when your forward space is occupied, the blocking car loses 10 km/h. You may then stop moving or move sideways if possible.

name: Shove Aside
category: Muscle Car Set - Blue Mustang GT500 with Black Stripes
effect: Move the blocking car 1 lane outward if possible. If it moves, you may enter the space it left. If it cannot move, both cars suffer collision and you stop moving.

name: Overpower
category: Muscle Car Set - Blue Mustang GT500 with Black Stripes
effect: The blocking car loses 1 Gear. You lose 10 km/h and stop moving.

name: Door Slam
category: Muscle Car Set - Blue Mustang GT500 with Black Stripes
effect: That car loses 10 km/h. If it is in the outer lane, it loses 20 km/h instead.

name: No Room
category: Muscle Car Set - Blue Mustang GT500 with Black Stripes
effect: Adjacent opponents cannot move sideways into your lane this turn.

name: Brake
category: Additional Common
effect: Speed -20 km/h. You may discard 1 card from hand.
